description_long: This apartment building features a symmetrical brick facade with classical architectural elements, including prominent columns and decorative cornices along the front. The structure is two stories tall, with large rectangular windows arranged in a regular pattern on both floors. The roof is gently curved and light gray, with a central raised section that may house ventilation or skylights. The sides and rear of the building are simpler, with fewer decorative details and a consistent brick finish. The entrance is marked by a set of double doors framed by columns, giving the building a stately and formal appearance. The building sits on a paved area, suggesting it is designed for an urban environment.
description: A stately two-story brick apartment building with classical columns, large windows, and a gently curved gray roof, featuring a formal double-door entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with columns, decorative cornices, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the building's depth, plain brickwork, and regularly spaced windows on both floors.
description_view_2: Rear view with a simple brick facade, minimal decoration, and a row of windows on each floor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, highlighting the building's length and window placement.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in evenly spaced vertical and horizontal rows on all visible sides, with a consistent rectangular shape and size.
